header.title: Maignelay- Montigny Tour et rempart.jpg
header.description:
This building is inscrit au titre des monuments historiques de la France. It is indexed in the base Mérimée, a database of architectural heritage maintained by the French Ministry of Culture, under the reference PA60000056 .
